title: Jim's food mod
description: Mod that adds a couple of foods with special effects
body:
This mod just adds silly things. It was made in like 6 hours in mcrator so dont expect much
This mod mainly adds food that gives you custom effects and other things, most of the food can be crafted in survival. But there is also things other than food there is a few pieces of custum 3D armour and one wepon. I will be adding more things in the future and also updating old things becouse some are not working as expected (for exapmle the sour (pach) kids should teleport u to a custom structure in the future). I am working on the mod right now and i hope you will like it! 


Also here are some things this mod adds:
- A burger that makes you small (I am working on something that will make you go to your original size in the future)
- A new wepon a little bit better than a netherite sword called pool noodle
- A yellow mask (I am working on addingmore masks)
- A block of shugar that you can right click for something to happen
- New advancements to guide you to the crafting recepies (I am trying to make them pop up if u ghater the correct materials but im not shure how to do that yet)
- A structure called the wizard tower

These are not all the things but i hope they made you interested in the mod.
